---
title: "CLI reference"
description: "Common DraftStack CLI commands."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

Authenticate with `draftstack auth login`.

Set up GitHub with `draftstack setup github --print-url`.

Create a project with `draftstack projects create --name Docs --docs-repo pat-baseten/draftstack-docs --repo pat-baseten/draftstack`.

Review suggestions with `draftstack suggestions list --project <project-id> --output json`.
